title: Tekst | Enterprise AI that automates workflows—and drives results
full_text:
Button Text Button Text
📣 The biggest Enterprise AI Event of the year is back. Register here for Contekst 2026
Solutions
Success Stories
About
Pricing
Book a Call Book a Call
Book a Call
Book a Demo Book a Demo
Book a Demo
The world’s leading enterprises can now automate with confidence.
Top use cases for process automation
Automate the work that lives between your Inbox, CRM and ERP.
"Everyone's selling AI. Tekst gave us the one thing that made it safe to use: visibility into how our process actually runs."
“Before automating anything, they showed us how our order-to-cash process truly works across our teams and regions, including the exceptions our systems never surfaced. That clarity is what finally let us automate with confidence.”
Christophe Williams
Chief Transformation Officer
Quote-to-Cash
Quote to Cash →
Order intake →
Connect Outlook with SAP Automation →
Seamless case creation in Salesforce →
Procure-to-Pay
Accounts Payable →
Inventory solutions →
Intelligent Document Processing →
Order Operations
Dispute, claims & credit handling →
Order & exception prioritization →
Order enrichment with context →
Order & request classification →
Shared Inbox & Support
Shared inbox management →
AI-driven email labeling & routing →
Outlook shared inbox automation →
Automated product incident reporting →
View all use cases View all use cases
View all use cases
Mapping a process used to take six months. Now it takes an afternoon.
Tekst turns unstructured communication into real process intelligence, so AI can execute workflows across your enterprise stack with accuracy, control, and continuous optimization.
Talk to Tekst Talk to Tekst
Talk to Tekst
99+
Without Tekst
Unstructured communication hides how work actually happens, causing delays and missed opportunities.
Teams spend hours stitching processes together across inboxes, documents, and systems.
Automations remain fragile, forcing teams to babysit workflows that don’t scale.
Lack of operational context makes it nearly impossible to deploy AI agents with confidence.
99+
Tekst
Process Intelligence maps how decisions and workflows truly flow across your organization.
AI agents automate operational workflows across systems without changing how teams work.
Real-time process insights reveal bottlenecks and continuously surface new automation opportunities.
Automated execution keeps systems synchronized, reduces manual effort, and improves over time.
+25
more
+25
more
+25
more
Turn Systems of Record into
Systems of Action.
No system overhauls. No downtime. Just intelligent automation that optimizes efficiency, connects data, and scales effortlessly.
Talk to Tekst Talk to Tekst
Talk to Tekst
Optimize end-to-end processes,
from Quote-to-cash to P2P.
AI built for your business
A custom-trained AI model built on your company’s data, workflows, and expertise—continuously learning and optimizing to improve efficiency at scale.
Enterprise-grade security & compliance
Your company retains full ownership and control of its data. Tekst processes information in real-time, ensuring enterprise-level security, compliance, and trust.
Seamless integration
No change management required. Tekst integrates directly into your company’s existing tools and systems, keeping operations smooth, efficient, and scalable.
ROI in days, not months.
Unified Integrations
Connect Tekst to inbox, CRM, ERP and workflow tools to capture operational interactions in real time.
1 hour
1 day
Process Intelligence
Topic discovery and workflow insights reveal bottlenecks, handoffs and hidden operational patterns.
Context Graph Builder
Tekst builds a context graph mapping decisions, dependencies and end-to-end workflow logic across systems, giving you and AI Agents necessary visibility.
1 week
1 month
Agentic Automation
AI agents execute workflows, update enterprise systems and handle real-world exceptions autonomously.
Autonomous Optimization
Tekst learns from every interaction to expand automation and optimize processes over time.
Book a Demo Book a Demo
Book a Demo
Success stories from the real world.
“Seamless shared inbox collaboration”
“With Tekst, we transitioned from personal mailboxes to a shared inbox, significantly improving our email management and collaboration. Now, colleagues can easily assist each other, enhancing our customer service efficiency.”
Sophie De Keer
Milcobel | FMCG
shared inbox
250K
emails annually
200%
faster FRT
“Tekst is great for routing large volumes”
“Managing millions of emails annually was a monumental task until we partnered with Tekst. Their AI-powered solution improved our email routing accuracy to 90% in just weeks, streamlining our operations and enhancing customer satisfaction.”
Christophe Lapeau
Securex | HR & Payroll
3.2
million emails
90
accuracy
85%
auto-classification
Enterprise efficiency, verified

How it works.
Tekst automates complex and repetitive work. In just a few days, our AI connects to your systems, learns your business’s unique language(s), and begins to streamline operations—without workflow disruptions. Here’s how it works:
See Tekst in action See Tekst in action
See Tekst in action
Step 1
Map reality
Connect inboxes, ERP, CRM, and documents to reveal how work actually flows across your business. Turn unstructured communication into a real-time map of decisions, bottlenecks, and process opportunities.
Step 2
Automate with confidence
Deploy AI agents that execute workflows across systems and handle real-world exceptions without breaking. Automate complex operational work in weeks — without heavy IT or change management.
Step 3
Continuously improve
Every interaction makes your processes smarter and reveals the next automation opportunity. Scale from isolated workflows to self-optimizing operations that grow with your business.
Join our team.
As our company rapidly expands, we are always on the lookout for ambitious individuals eager to join our dynamic team of top tier talent.
Join our team Join our team
Join our team
Discover the impact of AI on your enterprise. Whether you're exploring automation or ready to optimize at scale, our experts are here to help—no jargon, just real solutions.
A look behind the scenes.
Talk to our experts Talk to our experts
Talk to our experts
Wouter Janssen
Automation Engineer @ Tekst
The self-improving company is here.
Big claims are easy. Real impact is what matters. Tekst doesn’t just promise efficiency—we turn "where did that message go? " into "already handled. "
See the stories See the stories
See the stories
Food
Milcobel
Milcobel is one of Belgium's largest dairy cooperatives, delivering high-quality dairy products like milk powders, mozzarella, cheese, and ice cream to B2B customers globally. Milcobel generated a revenue of €1.5 billion, with over 1,800 global employees and millions of cows. Switched from personal inboxes to using 1 shared inbox, integrated with Outlook and SAP‍.
HR Services
Securex
Securex provides comprehensive HR services, from social secretariats and entrepreneurial support to prevention services.
Medtech
Becton Dickinson
Becton Dickinson (BD) is a global medical technology leader that manufactures and sells medical devices to hospitals, laboratories, and healthcare institutions worldwide. With a vast network of customers, BD faces the ongoing challenge of delivering exceptional service while managing an enormous volume of support requests.

How it works.
Tekst automates complex and repetitive work. In just a few days, our AI connects to your systems, learns your business’s unique language(s), and begins to streamline operations—without workflow disruptions. Here’s how it works:
See Tekst in action See Tekst in action
See Tekst in action
Step 1
Map reality
Connect inboxes, ERP, CRM, and documents to reveal how work actually flows across your business. Turn unstructured communication into a real-time map of decisions, bottlenecks, and process opportunities.
Step 2
Automate with confidence
Deploy AI agents that execute workflows across systems and handle real-world exceptions without breaking. Automate complex operational work in weeks — without heavy IT or change management.
Step 3
Continuously improve
Every interaction makes your processes smarter and reveals the next automation opportunity. Scale from isolated workflows to self-optimizing operations that grow with your business.

Food
Milcobel
Milcobel is one of Belgium's largest dairy cooperatives, delivering high-quality dairy products like milk powders, mozzarella, cheese, and ice cream to B2B customers globally. Milcobel generated a revenue of €1.5 billion, with over 1,800 global employees and millions of cows. Switched from personal inboxes to using 1 shared inbox, integrated with Outlook and SAP‍.
HR Services
Securex
Securex provides comprehensive HR services, from social secretariats and entrepreneurial support to prevention services.
Medtech
Becton Dickinson
Becton Dickinson (BD) is a global medical technology leader that manufactures and sells medical devices to hospitals, laboratories, and healthcare institutions worldwide. With a vast network of customers, BD faces the ongoing challenge of delivering exceptional service while managing an enormous volume of support requests.
